calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Aciton Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Aciton Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Continued To Jul-31-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Alan Wilcox, Esq., of WILSHIRE LAW FIRM, PLC, Tel: (213) 381-9988 for plaintiff.
Davide Reese, Esq., of Fine, Boggs & Perkins LLP., Tel:6505447895 for defendant.

Hearing held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from Plaintiff's counsel. Plaintiff exceeded the applicable page limit without obtaining prior permission from the Court. Plaintiff submitted 22 pages, despite the limitation set forth in California Rules of Court, rule 3.1113(d), which restricts to 15 pages. Additionally, Plaintiff seeks to raise multiple clarification in response to the tentative ruling. The matter discussed. The Court, having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Marc Hidalgo's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is CONTINUED TO July 31, 2026, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT AND THE COURT ORDERS FURTHER BRIEFING AND EVIDENCE.

(See word minutes for complete detail)

Order Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
